message:
fix(engine): fail closed on missing cross-pack metadata, empty violation suite with nonzero failures, and unprefixed key-id preimages

cross_repo_contract: is_passing() now also checks self.failed == 0, not
just self.violations.is_empty(). Previously a suite with failed > 0 but
empty violations would wrongly report as passing.

versioned_rewrite_pack: has_cross_blocking() changed from is_some_and to
is_none_or so missing cross-pack metadata fails closed (returns blocking)
instead of silently passing.

receipt_verifier_pipeline: add length-prefix before operator_key_id in
checkpoint_preimage() to prevent collisions when key IDs contain delimiter
bytes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
